title: Stream JSONL HTTP Responses with Go
summary: Stream JSONL HTTP responses from Go with one record channel and per-record flushes.
highlights: Streams one JSONL record per line
verification_notes: Executed from the snippet root with Go 1.24.4 on macOS. Verified behavior covers JSONL headers and records, per-record flushes, client disconnect handling, channel close handling, missing streaming support, marshal failures, and nil input or write error handling.
